title: SubTierTagger
description: A TierTagger Mod for the Subtiers Tierlist
body:
# SubTierTagger
This is the TierTagger Mod for the SubTiers Tierlist.
It includes Cart, Bed, Creeper, Diamond SMP, OG Vanilla, Speed, Manhunt, Iron Pot, Diamond Vanilla, Trident, Elytra and Bow.

The mod is also compatible with the MCTiers TierTagger Mod as the Tiers get displayed on the right side of the screen.

If you have any suggestions or want to report a bug join [My Discord](https://discord.gg/YrCKU8vDVf).

### 1.0.0
To Switch between gamemodes you have to do the /subtiers command followed by one of the above mentioned gamemodes as mentioned above.
You can also use /subtierstagger <username> to check all tiers of a player. 

### 1.1.* - 1.2.0
Open Config GUI with Keybind (By default H) or through Mod Menu. 
In there you can toggle the Mod and also change the gamemode.
With /subtiertagger <username> or /stt <username> you can get a list of all the Tiers somebody has.
With /stttoggle you can also toggle the mod.
If a Player isn't tested in the gamemode you selected but they have a tier in Subtiers then it will show their highest tiered Gamemode.
